title: Purged OOF Stacking with Raw-Cat CatBoost Sidecar
summary: Current best code hand-engineers many category frequencies, but CatBoost is built to form categorical combinations with ordered target statistics, which can recover interaction signal without manual leakage-prone encodings.
rationale: Current best code hand-engineers many category frequencies, but CatBoost is built to form categorical combinations with ordered target statistics, which can recover interaction signal without manual leakage-prone encodings. For blending, sigmoid stacking preserves ranking, whereas isotonic can introduce ties and shift AUC.
implementation_hint: Add a CatBoost sidecar using raw categorical columns plus minimal numeric features under chronological/grouped folds; generate strictly OOF predictions with race-level embargo around nearby laps, then blend GBDT + ranker + CatBoost using logistic regression or sigmoid calibration only on OOF scores.
expected_effect: Model diversity plus safer categorical handling should add incremental lift and reduce overfit to handcrafted encodings.
risk: If folds are not purged by race chronology, ordered statistics and stacker targets can still look better locally than they will generalize.
